category_sources: source_facts.description says small practical concatenative programming language and shell; official homepage describes min as a functional, concatenative programming language with a REPL.
display_name_sources: Official homepage brands it as the min programming language; source_facts.name is min-lang because the package name differs from the project name.
docs_sources: Official homepage links the Guide; the linked Developer Guide is the detailed official documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/h3rald/min, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official homepage says min is functional and concatenative, includes an advanced REPL, and is written in Nim; source_facts.description says programming language and shell.
